I found the README.md in the `projects/webapp/docs/` directory. Here are all the API endpoints mentioned:

## API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/users` | List all users |
| `POST` | `/api/users` | Create a new user |
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check |

These are the three endpoints defined in the Endpoints section of the README.md file.
